raw_judges: Jury Captains assigned to the 18 awards categories will pick local team members who are also experts in their category to join them in the jury process
jury through self-directed, honest video testimonials
jury of experts for being exemplary in its field
jury or juries to critique it
judges called “Jury Teams” headed up by a “Jury Captain” and have been selected by the Core77 Design Awards
raw_criteria: criteria may not be conveyed to the jury
